description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and tapering towards the ends. The body is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each showing a natural wood grain texture and some visible cracks and wear, suggesting age and use. Two wide black metal hoops, each fastened with large round rivets, encircle the barrel to provide structural reinforcement. A small wooden spigot protrudes from one end, indicating the barrel is designed to dispense liquid contents. The top features a small wooden bung or stopper, while the ends are flat and show the circular arrangement of the staves. The overall appearance is rustic and robust, suitable for storage or transport of liquids in an urban or historical setting.
description: A rustic wooden barrel with black metal hoops, a spigot, and a wooden stopper, showing natural wood grain and signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, both metal hoops, and the wood grain detail.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the open circular face, the spigot at the bottom, and the arrangement of the staves.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible wood grain, both metal hoops, and a small area of dark staining.
description_view_3: End view similar to view 1 but without the spigot, showing the flat face and stave arrangement.
